name: LangGraph
description: Graph-based agent orchestration with stateful multi-actor workflows. Deploy agents as REST APIs via LangGraph Platform. 32k stars, 34M monthly PyPI downloads.

skills.name: Stateful Agent Graphs
skills.description: Build agent workflows as typed state graphs with persistent checkpointing and resumable execution.

skills.name: Human-in-the-Loop
skills.description: Pause agent execution at any graph node for human review, approval, or input before continuing.

skills.name: Platform Deployment
skills.description: Deploy agent graphs as scalable REST APIs with built-in streaming, memory, and observability via LangGraph Platform.
